results.rendered_html: pṛthā f. N. of a daughter of Śūra and adopted d˚ of Kuntī and one of the wives of Pāṇḍu (mother of Karṇa before her marriage, and of Yudhiṣṭhira, Bhīma, and Arjuna after her m˚; see Kuntī),  MBh. ;  Hariv.  &c.

results.rendered_html:
pṛthā N. of Kuntī, one of the two wives of Pāṇḍu.
Comp.
— jaḥ tanayaḥ, -sutaḥ, -sūnu an epithet of the first three Pāṇḍava princes, but generally applied only to Arjuna; aśvatthānā hata iti pṛthāsūnunā spaṣṭamuktavā  Ve. 3. 9 ; abhitasnaṃ pṛthāsūnuḥ snehena paritastare  Ki. 11. 8. 
— patiḥ an epithet of Pāṇḍu.
